column18: Comments

column1: Renzo Berzabat Neyra de la Cruz
Angello Omaet Niño De Guzmán Zevallos

column18:
- Completed onboarding successfully with a proactive attitude and good ownership of her learning.
- Remained attentive throughout training, with no major behavioral concerns identified.
- Participation in live sessions was limited; encourage more proactive engagement and contributions during discussions.
- Self-assigned tickets while waiting for support on another case; expectations around ticket workflow were reviewed during a breakout session.
- Did not respond to a Slack DM or Google Meet invitation for a reverse shadowing session; reinforce timely communication and acknowledgment of trainer requests.
- Logged in late on one occasion (8:03); reinforce punctuality and schedule adherence.
- Overall, performance and attitude were positive, but supervisors should continue reinforcing proactive communication, participation, and adherence to established workflows.

- Demonstrates good judgment and solid decision-making when handling cases; remains committed to learning and performs reliably overall.
- Participation is inconsistent. He is usually attentive on camera and answers correctly when prompted, but would benefit from contributing more proactively during live sessions.
- Repeated lateness throughout onboarding (15–47 minutes), with some occasions lacking proactive communication. - Reinforce punctuality and timely notification of issues.
- Fell asleep during one afternoon sync session, requiring reinforcement of engagement expectations during training.
- Showed uncertainty about where to find workflows/processes on one occasion; continue reinforcing resource awareness and self-sufficiency.
- Missed a trainer request during a Critical Thinking assessment call; reinforce responsiveness to trainer communications.
- Overall, there are no major concerns regarding attitude or case-handling quality. However, supervisors should closely monitor attendance, communication, engagement, and workflow readiness to ensure consistent performance.

- Demonstrates consistent engagement throughout training, actively participates, asks questions, and completes assigned activities effectively.
- While generally quieter during group discussions, he contributes when prompted, volunteers during ticket activities, shares his screen, and clearly explains his thought process.
- Had a few lateness incidents, including one 10–15 minute delay due to reported connectivity issues and one significant late login (8:42 AM). Reinforce punctuality and proactive communication.
- Was briefly distracted by checking his phone during a training segment; reinforce maintaining full attention during learning sessions.
- Did not respond promptly to a Slack request to join a Critical Thinking assessment; reinforce timely responsiveness to trainer communications.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Supervisors should continue encouraging more proactive participation while reinforcing attendance, communication, and focus during training sessions.

- Demonstrates steady progress, remains attentive during training, and consistently completes assigned activities with reliable performance.
- Participation during live sessions is limited. He is generally reserved, contributes mainly when prompted, and would benefit from taking a more proactive role in discussions.
- Had one minor lateness incident (5–10 minutes) during an afternoon sync; reinforce punctuality.
- Repeatedly missed trainer requests to join Critical Thinking assessment calls due to not monitoring Slack notifications. - This continued after coaching and assistance with notification settings; reinforce the expectation of staying responsive during working hours.
- Overall, no concerns regarding work quality or reliability. Supervisors should focus on increasing proactive participation and ensuring timely responsiveness to Slack communications and required training activities.

- Successfully completed onboarding with a proactive attitude and excellent engagement throughout the training process.
- Consistently participated in sessions, demonstrated strong critical thinking, asked thoughtful questions, and contributed valuable insights while remaining attentive on camera.
- Had one minor lateness incident (approximately 10–15 minutes) due to a reported power outage. Coaching was provided on proactively communicating delays through Slack or WhatsApp.
- Had one schedule adherence deviation by taking lunch one hour later than scheduled. Reinforce the importance of following WFM schedules and notifying leadership when exceptions are needed.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Supervisors should continue reinforcing schedule adherence while encouraging her to maintain the strong participation, curiosity, and proactive attitude she demonstrated during onboarding.

- Successfully completed onboarding and remained attentive and engaged throughout training, consistently completing assigned activities.
- Participation during live sessions was generally quiet. Encourage more proactive contributions and involvement during discussions.
- Repeated punctuality concerns, including several late logins (ranging from 5 minutes to nearly an hour), often without prior communication. Reinforce attendance expectations and the importance of notifying leadership proactively.
- Was late to a Critical Thinking assessment, was unresponsive via Slack, and missed a scheduled 1:1 session with the Trainer Lead. Reinforce responsiveness to trainer communications and attendance at required meetings.
- Overall, there are no concerns regarding attitude or learning commitment. Supervisors should focus on improving punctuality, communication, and responsiveness while encouraging more active participation during team sessions.

- Demonstrates a positive attitude, collaborates well with peers, and remains engaged throughout training. Participates by asking questions and sharing valuable insights, though engagement can be more consistent.
- Participation during live sessions varies. While she contributes voluntarily at times, encourage more proactive and consistent involvement without needing to be prompted.
- Had one minor lateness incident (5–10 minutes) and did not respond to a Slack message during the session. Reinforce punctuality and the expectation of monitoring Slack as the primary communication channel.
- Had one login/adherence discrepancy by joining a call before logging into the system (Z). Reinforce correct login procedures and schedule adherence.
- Did not respond to a trainer request to join a Critical Thinking assessment. Reinforce responsiveness to trainer communications and required training activities.
- Was observed looking at answers during a knowledge assessment, which is considered a serious assessment integrity violation. Expectations were clearly reinforced, and close follow-up is recommended to ensure compliance with assessment policies moving forward.
- Overall, Bessy demonstrates a positive learning attitude, but supervisors should closely monitor assessment integrity, communication responsiveness, and consistency in participation.

- Successfully completed onboarding with a proactive attitude and consistently completed assigned activities.
- Remained attentive during training with his camera on, though participation was generally limited. Encourage more proactive engagement during live sessions.
- Had one minor lateness incident (5 minutes) during an afternoon sync; reinforce punctuality.
- Did not use the appropriate workflow for adding CX channels because he was unsure where to find it and did not ask for support. Reinforce the expectation to seek help when instructions are unclear and to use available resources before proceeding.
- Was briefly distracted during a multilevel escalation training session. Reinforce maintaining full attention during educational segments.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Supervisors should encourage greater participation, reinforce proactive communication when clarification is needed, and continue promoting focus during training sessions.

- Successfully completed onboarding with a highly communicative attitude and strong engagement throughout the training process.
- Actively participated in sessions, remained attentive, and demonstrated commitment to learning.
- Fell asleep during the welcome onboarding session; this appears to have been an isolated incident and did not impact her overall engagement during the remainder of training.
- Occasionally required instructions to be repeated to ensure understanding. Continue reinforcing active listening and encourage asking clarifying questions when needed.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Supervisors should continue supporting her strong participation while reinforcing attention to instructions to promote greater independence.

- Demonstrates outstanding engagement and is consistently one of the most participative members of the group.
- Actively contributes during sessions, asks thoughtful questions, provides constructive feedback, and remains attentive on camera throughout training.
- Shows a strong willingness to learn by proactively seeking clarification and applying feedback when navigating new concepts or procedures.
- Had one minor login/adherence discrepancy by joining a call before logging into the system (Z). Reinforce proper login procedures and schedule adherence.
- Overall, no behavioral concerns. Daiana consistently demonstrates a positive attitude, strong collaboration, and commitment to learning. Supervisors should continue encouraging her proactive approach and support her as she builds confidence with new processes.

- Successfully completed onboarding and remained attentive throughout training, though participation during live sessions was generally limited. Encourage more proactive involvement in discussions.
- Demonstrated recurring punctuality concerns, with multiple late arrivals (5–20 minutes), including a Critical Thinking session. Reinforce attendance expectations and the importance of notifying leadership proactively when delays occur.
- Had one login/adherence discrepancy by joining a call before logging into the system (logged in at 8:09). Reinforce proper login procedures.
- Repeatedly showed delayed or missing responses to Slack messages, including reverse shadowing requests and trainer DMs. She primarily uses Slack in the browser and does not check notifications consistently. Reinforce the expectation to actively monitor Slack during working hours.
- Missed or joined required training sessions late after reporting she had not seen notifications, despite being tagged and contacted directly. Continue reinforcing communication expectations and notification management.
- Overall, there are no concerns regarding learning attitude or task completion. However, supervisors should closely monitor punctuality, Slack responsiveness, and communication habits, as these have become recurring behaviors rather than isolated incidents.

- Successfully completed onboarding with strong engagement and a positive attitude throughout the training process.
- Consistently participated during sessions, contributed thoughtful case analyses, and remained attentive throughout the week.
- Had minor punctuality issues, including one late arrival at the start of onboarding and one 5-minute delay to an afternoon sync. Reinforce punctuality expectations.
- Had one login/adherence discrepancy by joining a call before logging into the system (logged in at 8:05). Reinforce proper login procedures and schedule adherence.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Fabrizio demonstrated consistent engagement, reliable participation, and strong learning commitment. Supervisors should continue encouraging these behaviors while reinforcing punctuality and adherence to login procedures.

- Demonstrated strong engagement throughout onboarding, consistently participating in sessions, showing good critical thinking, and remaining attentive.
- Experienced several punctuality issues early in training, including significant delays during the first two days. Coaching was provided on proactively communicating delays through Slack or WhatsApp, and attendance improved as the week progressed.
- Had a few additional minor lateness incidents due to technical issues, including email login problems and delayed logins without prior communication. Reinforce punctuality and proactive communication when issues arise.
- Had one login/adherence discrepancy by joining a call before logging into the system (logged in at 8:06). Reinforce proper login procedures and schedule adherence.
- Overall, Francesca responded well to feedback and showed a clear improvement after the initial attendance concerns. Supervisors should continue monitoring punctuality, but her engagement, participation, and commitment to learning have been consistently strong.

- Successfully completed onboarding with a positive attitude, remaining engaged and completing all assigned activities.
- Remained attentive throughout training, though participation during live sessions was limited. Encourage more proactive contributions during discussions.
- Had one significant lateness incident (53 minutes) due to a reported internet and phone outage, which prevented advance notification. This appears to be an isolated event rather than a recurring pattern.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Supervisors should continue encouraging more active participation while monitoring attendance, although the reported lateness does not indicate an ongoing issue.

- Successfully completed onboarding with strong engagement and a consistently positive attitude.
- Actively participated throughout training, demonstrated solid critical thinking, and remained attentive during sessions.
- Had one isolated attendance incident after falling asleep and joining a session approximately 30 minutes late. 
- Reinforce punctuality and attendance expectations.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Georgireth consistently demonstrated commitment to learning and reliable engagement. Supervisors should continue encouraging her strong participation while informally reinforcing attendance expectations following the isolated late arrival.

- Demonstrates steady progress, remains engaged throughout training, and consistently meets expectations in daily responsibilities.
- Participation is generally positive, though he tends to contribute after being prompted or toward the end of discussions. His insights are valuable and benefit from his previous BPO experience. Encourage more proactive participation.
- Had one significant lateness incident (30+ minutes) on the first day, which was addressed by leadership, along with one additional minor late login (8:05). Reinforce punctuality and proactive communication when delays occur.
- Occasionally turned his camera off during sessions. While this did not impact his performance, reinforce the expectation of maintaining camera presence when required.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Supervisors should continue encouraging more proactive participation while monitoring punctuality and adherence to engagement expectations during live sessions.

- Successfully completed onboarding with a proactive attitude and strong commitment throughout the training process.
- Consistently remained attentive, actively participated in sessions, and contributed valuable insights during discussions.
- Demonstrated initiative, engagement, and a positive learning mindset across all training activities.
- No behavioral or attendance concerns were identified during onboarding.
- Overall, Ana Lucia exceeded expectations in engagement and participation. Supervisors should continue reinforcing her proactive approach and encourage her to maintain this level of performance as she transitions into operations.

- Demonstrates steady progress, remains engaged during training, and consistently meets expectations in daily responsibilities.
- Stays attentive with his camera on, asks questions, and participates during sessions, though contributions are generally occasional or after being prompted. Encourage more proactive participation in group discussions.
- Was briefly distracted during a multilevel escalation training session. Reinforce maintaining full attention during educational segments.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Jean Carlo has shown a positive attitude, reliable performance, and consistent engagement. Supervisors should continue encouraging more proactive participation while reinforcing focus during training sessions.

- Demonstrates outstanding engagement and consistently participates throughout training sessions.
- Actively asks thoughtful questions, seeks clarification when needed, and contributes to discussions without requiring prompts.
- Maintains a positive attitude, keeps his camera on during sessions, and remains attentive throughout training.
- Collaborates effectively by sharing his work and explaining his thought process during practical activities.
- No behavioral, attendance, or communication concerns were identified during onboarding.
- Overall, JoseMa exceeded expectations in participation, collaboration, and commitment to learning. Supervisors should encourage him to maintain this proactive approach as he transitions into operations.

- Remained engaged throughout onboarding and participated actively during training sessions, despite requiring additional support in some areas.
- Demonstrated a slower learning pace at times, occasionally needing instructions to be repeated before completing tasks. Continue providing reinforcement and encourage asking clarifying questions early.
- Experienced recurring punctuality issues throughout the week, with multiple late arrivals (ranging from a few minutes to 55 minutes) due to various reasons, including a power outage, personal circumstances, and laptop updates. Reinforce punctuality expectations and proactive communication when delays occur.
- On one occasion, did not notify trainers in advance about a delay caused by laptop updates. Reinforce the importance of communicating issues as soon as they arise.
- Required reminders regarding camera use during sessions and completion of basic Slack setup (profile photo). Reinforce adherence to training expectations and communication standards.
- Overall, Jose demonstrates a positive attitude and willingness to learn. Supervisors should focus on improving punctuality, proactive communication, and providing additional coaching to help him build confidence and keep pace with new processes.

- Demonstrates steady progress, completes assigned activities, and consistently meets expectations in daily responsibilities.
- Remains attentive during training and occasionally contributes valuable insights and thoughtful questions. Encourage more consistent and proactive participation during group discussions.
- Had one significant lateness incident (30 minutes) due to reported connection issues, which was addressed. Reinforce punctuality and proactive communication when delays occur.
- Had one login/adherence discrepancy by joining a call before logging into the required systems (app and Zendesk). Reinforce proper login procedures and schedule adherence.
- Was briefly distracted during a multilevel escalation training session. Reinforce maintaining full attention during educational activities.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Supervisors should continue encouraging more proactive participation while monitoring punctuality, adherence, and engagement during training sessions.

- Successfully completed onboarding and remained engaged throughout the training process despite occasional internet connectivity issues.
- Stayed attentive during sessions and contributed valuable insights when prompted. Encourage more proactive participation during group discussions.
- Had one minor lateness incident due to reported internet issues. This does not appear to be a recurring attendance concern.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Julio demonstrated a positive learning attitude and consistent engagement. Supervisors should continue encouraging more active participation while supporting his continued development.

- Demonstrates a positive attitude and willingness to learn, showing improved engagement over time by participating more actively and contributing valuable insights during some sessions.
- Continues to require reinforcement on foundational concepts and frequently asks questions about material that has already been covered. Encourage consistent review of training resources before live sessions and provide close coaching to strengthen confidence in core processes.
- Had one significant lateness incident (30+ minutes) at the start of onboarding, which was addressed by leadership.
- Repeatedly failed to respond to Slack messages and trainer requests for Critical Thinking assessments and reverse shadowing sessions, resulting in missed or delayed participation. Reinforce the expectation of actively monitoring Slack and responding promptly during working hours.
- Demonstrated inconsistent attendance to required training activities, including not joining a scheduled classroom session and delayed participation in coaching sessions.
- There was one discrepancy regarding lunch timing that impacted coaching time. Reinforce adherence to schedules and transparent communication with trainers.
- Overall, Junior shows potential and a positive learning attitude, but supervisors should closely monitor foundational knowledge retention, responsiveness to trainer communications, attendance at required sessions, and proactive preparation for training activities.

- Demonstrates curiosity and willingness to learn by asking thoughtful questions, remaining attentive during training, and completing assigned activities.
- Participation is inconsistent. While she has had highly engaged sessions, there are repeated concerns regarding compliance with training expectations.
- Experienced recurring punctuality issues, including multiple late arrivals. Previous coaching was provided, but continued reinforcement of punctuality and proactive communication is needed.
- Frequently did not comply with the mandatory camera-on policy despite multiple reminders. Reinforce expectations for participation during live training sessions.
- Repeatedly failed to respond to Slack messages and trainer requests for Critical Thinking assessments, resulting in missed or delayed participation. These behaviors have been addressed multiple times but continue to occur. Reinforce the expectation of actively monitoring Slack and attending all required sessions promptly.
- On one occasion, left a required session without notifying the team or updating her status, later indicating she was away. 
- Reinforce communication and adherence expectations during working hours.
- Has occasionally responded defensively to feedback and displayed a confrontational attitude during coaching conversations. Continue coaching on receiving feedback constructively and maintaining professional communication.
- Overall, Michelle demonstrates learning potential and positive engagement during some sessions. However, supervisors should closely monitor punctuality, compliance with training expectations, responsiveness to communications, and openness to feedback, as these have become recurring behavioral concerns requiring continued follow-up.

- Demonstrates strong engagement, communicates effectively, asks thoughtful questions, and contributes positively during training sessions.
- Participation has improved over time. While she was initially quieter and occasionally needed prompting, she has consistently demonstrated a positive attitude and active involvement.
- Had one significant lateness incident (30+ minutes) on the first day of onboarding, which was addressed by leadership. Reinforce punctuality expectations.
- Occasionally required reminders to keep her camera on during live sessions. Reinforce compliance with training participation expectations.
- There was one integrity concern related to not completing the required workflow to join Slack channels and continuing to state it had been completed despite evidence to the contrary. This was addressed during training and should be followed up to reinforce accountability, honesty, and adherence to established processes.
- Overall, Monica has demonstrated solid engagement and reliable performance. Supervisors should continue encouraging her active participation while reinforcing accountability and compliance with required procedures.

- Demonstrates strong engagement, remains attentive during training, and actively participates in discussions with a positive learning attitude.
- Had several minor lateness incidents throughout onboarding, including one delayed system login (8:09). Continue reinforcing punctuality and schedule adherence.
- Missed one scheduled sync session without providing prior or immediate communication. Reinforce the expectation of notifying leadership promptly whenever attendance is impacted.
- Reported access issues as the reason for not completing a required workflow, but the issue had not been communicated when it occurred. Reinforce the importance of proactively reporting technical or access problems so they can be resolved quickly.
- Overall, Pamela has shown solid commitment to learning and active participation. Supervisors should continue encouraging her engagement while reinforcing proactive communication, punctuality, and timely reporting of issues that may affect her work or training.

- Successfully completed onboarding with strong engagement, consistently participating in sessions, asking thoughtful questions, and demonstrating commitment to learning.
- Had one significant lateness incident at the beginning of onboarding, which was addressed by leadership. Also had one instance of leaving a breakout room for an extended period without timely communication, resulting in an unattended live ticket. Reinforce attendance and proactive communication expectations.
- Was briefly distracted during a training session and had one minor delayed system login without proactively communicating the issue. Reinforce focus during training and timely reporting of technical problems.
- Kept his camera off during a 1:1 session due to reported internet issues. Continue reinforcing camera expectations whenever connectivity allows.
- Received a Critical Case Handling coaching after multiple live ticket handling issues were identified. Key improvement areas include:
  - Following correct ticket ownership and reassignment procedures.
  - Using the appropriate format for chat and SMS interactions.
  - Completing required account merges and follow-ups.
  - Validating all Wabi submissions before sending them and avoiding unreviewed AI-generated content.
  - Applying retention expectations and following established operational processes.
  - Managing live ticket ownership and break schedules in accordance with WFM expectations.
- Overall, Piero has demonstrated strong engagement and a positive learning attitude. However, supervisors should prioritize close follow-up on live case handling quality and process adherence to ensure the coaching provided translates into consistent operational performance.

- Demonstrates steady progress, works independently, and consistently meets expectations in daily responsibilities.
- Participation during live sessions is generally reactive rather than proactive. While he contributes valuable insights when prompted, encourage more consistent involvement in discussions and practical activities.
- Had one significant lateness incident (30+ minutes) at the start of onboarding, which was addressed by leadership. No recurring attendance concerns were identified afterward.
- Shows resourcefulness by using his phone to remain camera-compliant during training, despite not having a camera on his computer.
- Overall, no significant behavioral concerns. Ricardo demonstrated reliable performance, a positive learning attitude, and improved engagement as the week progressed. Supervisors should continue encouraging more proactive participation while recognizing his commitment and adaptability.

- Remained engaged throughout onboarding, stayed attentive during sessions, and consistently met training expectations.
- Participation during live sessions was generally limited. Encourage more proactive involvement in discussions and learning activities.
- Had several minor punctuality and adherence issues, including a few late arrivals and one delayed system login (logged in at 8:12 after joining the call). Reinforce punctuality and proper login procedures.
- Required reminders to complete the basic Slack profile setup (profile photo). Reinforce adherence to communication platform expectations.
- Repeatedly did not respond to trainer requests through Slack for Critical Thinking assessments. Reinforce the expectation of actively monitoring Slack (training channels and DMs) and responding promptly during working hours.
- Overall, Rodrigo demonstrates a positive learning attitude and consistent engagement. Supervisors should continue encouraging more proactive participation while reinforcing responsiveness to Slack communications and adherence to attendance expectations.

- Remained engaged throughout onboarding, stayed attentive during sessions, and consistently completed assigned activities.
- Participation during live sessions was generally quieter than peers. While attentive, encourage more proactive involvement in discussions and learning activities.
- Demonstrated recurring punctuality concerns, including multiple late arrivals and delayed system logins. Reinforce punctuality expectations and the importance of proactively communicating any delays.
- Had one login/adherence discrepancy by joining a call before logging into the system. Reinforce proper login procedures and schedule adherence.
- Required reminders to complete the basic Slack profile setup (profile photo).
- Repeatedly did not respond to trainer requests through Slack for Critical Thinking assessments. Reinforce the expectation of actively monitoring Slack (training channels and DMs) and responding promptly during working hours.
- Overall, Rodrigo demonstrates a positive learning attitude and remains engaged during training. Supervisors should focus on improving punctuality, Slack responsiveness, and proactive participation to ensure consistent adherence to operational expectations.

column1: Jose David De La Cruz Canchán
